skill.name: template-skill
skill.description: A minimal template for creating a new AI skill with metadata and instruction placeholders.
skill.summary: Start a new Claude, Codex, or Claude Code skill from a simple structure.
skill.author: ComposioHQ

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer reported two high-severity weak cryptography matches at SKILL.md:3. Manual review found only placeholder YAML description text and no cryptographic code, commands, network access, filesystem access, or prompt injection content.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Match
low_findings.description: The analyzer reported two weak cryptography findings on the same placeholder description line. SKILL.md:3 contains only metadata text and does not reference or implement a weak cryptographic algorithm.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed line is plain YAML description text. There is no code, algorithm name, cryptographic API, or execution path on this line.

content.user_title: Create a New AI Skill Template
content.value_statement: Teams need a consistent starting point when creating new AI skills. This template provides the basic metadata and instruction section for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code workflows.
actual_capabilities: Provides a minimal SKILL.md frontmatter structure.
Defines a skill name field for marketplace identification.
Includes a description placeholder for activation guidance.
Provides a clear section where authors can add instructions.
Supports use as a starting point for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code skills.
limitations: Does not include finished task instructions.
Does not provide scripts, examples, or helper files.
Does not validate completed skill content.
Requires authors to replace all placeholder text before publication.

use_cases.title: Start a Community Skill
use_cases.description: Create the first SKILL.md file before adding detailed instructions and examples.

use_cases.title: Standardize Internal Skill Drafts
use_cases.description: Give contributors the same basic structure for new internal AI skills.

use_cases.title: Teach Skill File Basics
use_cases.description: Show new authors the required frontmatter and instruction section in a small file.

prompt_templates.title: Beginner Skill Draft
prompt_templates.scenario: Create a first draft from the template.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use this template to draft a skill for [task]. Replace the name, description, and instruction section with clear user-facing guidance.

prompt_templates.title: Improve Activation Description
prompt_templates.scenario: Make the description specific enough for reliable tool selection.
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this skill description and rewrite it so Claude, Codex, and Claude Code know exactly when to use the skill.

prompt_templates.title: Add Operational Instructions
prompt_templates.scenario: Turn a placeholder into useful skill behavior.
prompt_templates.prompt: Expand the instruction section for a skill that helps with [workflow]. Include inputs, process steps, outputs, and limits.

prompt_templates.title: Publication Readiness Review
prompt_templates.scenario: Check whether a completed skill is ready for marketplace review.
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit this completed SKILL.md for missing metadata, vague instructions, unsafe guidance, and marketplace content gaps.

output_examples.input: Create a template-based skill for release notes.
output_examples.output: A concise skill draft with a release-notes name, a specific activation description, and an instruction section for summarizing changes.

output_examples.input: Review whether the placeholder text was replaced.
output_examples.output: A short readiness report that lists remaining placeholders and the exact sections that need author updates.
A clearer description that states the workflow, target files, expected inputs, and when the skill should activate.

best_practices: Replace every placeholder before publishing the skill.
Keep the description specific to the workflow and expected user intent.
Add examples only after the core instructions are accurate.
anti_patterns: Publishing the template without replacing placeholder text.
Using a broad description that triggers the skill for unrelated tasks.
Adding hidden instructions that conflict with user or system guidance.

faq.question: What does this skill provide?
faq.answer: It provides a minimal SKILL.md structure with frontmatter and a place for author instructions.

faq.question: Is this a complete production skill?
faq.answer: No. It is a starter template and must be customized before publication.

faq.question: Can it be used with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The template is suitable for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code skill drafts.

faq.question: Does it run commands or scripts?
faq.answer: No. The reviewed file contains only Markdown and YAML frontmatter.

faq.question: What should authors change first?
faq.answer: Authors should replace the name, description, and instruction placeholder with task-specific guidance.

faq.question: Why was a weak cryptography warning reported?
faq.answer: The scanner matched placeholder description text on SKILL.md:3. Manual review found no cryptographic code.
